description.value:
You learn dream-related magic to aid your studies. Choose @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Dream Message] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Sleep] upon taking this feat; you learn this spell as a 4th-rank occult innate spell that you can cast once per day. If you choose sleep, you can cast the spell only while in a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Daydream Trance]. You become trained in the spell attack modifier and spell DC statistics, and your spellcasting attribute for these spells is Wisdom.

Special You can take this feat twice, gaining the spell you didn't select initially the second time.
